name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Process identifiers *)
VARIABLES state, ticket, maxTicket

(* State of each process: 0=idle, 1=trying, 2=critical *)
State == [p \in 1..N |-> 0..2]

(* Ticket assignment: ticket[p] is the ticket number of process p, 0 if none *)
Ticket == [p \in 1..N |-> 0..N]

(* Max ticket seen so far *)
MaxTicket == 0..N

(* Initial state: all idle, no tickets, maxTicket=0 *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ ticket = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ maxTicket = 0

(* Helper: next ticket number for process p *)
NextTicket(p) == maxTicket + 1

(* Transition: process p enters trying state and takes a ticket *)
Enter(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = 0
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 1]
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![p] = NextTicket(p)]
  /\ maxTicket' = NextTicket(p)

(* Helper: process p enters critical section if it has the smallest ticket *)
EnterCritical(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = 1
  /\ \A q \in 1..N : (ticket[q] = 0) \/ (ticket[q] > ticket[p]) \/ (q = p)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 2]
  /\ ticket' = ticket

(* Helper: process p exits critical section *)
Exit(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = 2
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 0]
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![p] = 0]

(* Next-state relation: any process may perform one of the actions *)
Next ==
  \E p \in 1..N :
    Enter(p) \/ EnterCritical(p) \/ Exit(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, ticket, maxTicket>>

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A p, q \in 1..N : (state[p] = 2 /\ state[q] = 2) => p = q

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

(* Each participant is identified by a natural number in 1..N *)
VARIABLES state, vote

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
StateVal == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Vote values: "Yes", "No" *)
VoteVal == {"Yes", "No"}

Init == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ vote = [p \in Participants |-> ""]

Next ==
  \E p \in Participants :
    \/ /\ state[p] = "Init"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
    \/ /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
       /\ vote[p] \in VoteVal
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = IF vote[p] = "Yes" THEN "Committed" ELSE "Aborted"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, vote>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Forks are numbered 0..N-1 *)
VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = p means fork i is held by philosopher p (0 <= p < N)
   forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> -1]
        /\ state = [p \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates *)
Free(i) == forks[i] = -1
HasFork(p, i) == forks[i] = p

(* A philosopher can pick up a fork if it is free *)
PickUp(p, i) == /\ Free(i)
                 /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = p]
                 /\ UNCHANGED state

(* A philosopher can put down a fork if he holds it *)
PutDown(p, i) == /\ HasFork(p, i)
                 /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1]
                 /\ UNCHANGED state

(* State transitions for a philosopher *)
Think(p) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
Hungry(p) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
Eat(p) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

(* A philosopher can start eating if both adjacent forks are free *)
StartEating(p) ==
  LET left == p
      right == (p + 1) % N
  IN  /\ state[p] = "hungry"
      /\ Free(left) /\ Free(right)
      /\ PickUp(p, left) /\ PickUp(p, right)
      /\ Eat(p)

(* A philosopher can finish eating and put down both forks *)
FinishEating(p) ==
  LET left == p
      right == (p + 1) % N
  IN  /\ state[p] = "eating"
      /\ PutDown(p, left) /\ PutDown(p, right)
      /\ Think(p)

(* One step of the system: any philosopher may change state or pick/put forks *)
Next ==
  \E p \in 0..N-1 :
    \/ (state[p] = "thinking" /\ Think(p))
    \/ (state[p] = "thinking" /\ Hungry(p))
    \/ (state[p] = "hungry" /\ StartEating(p))
    \/ (state[p] = "eating" /\ FinishEating(p))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Proc

(* Helper: set of all processes *)
AllProc == {1, 2, .., N}

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES num, flag

(* Initial state: all processes not choosing and with no ticket *)
Init == /\ num = [p \in AllProc |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in AllProc |-> FALSE]

(* Helper predicate: process p is waiting for a ticket *)
Choosing(p) == flag[p]

(* Helper predicate: process p has a ticket *)
HasTicket(p) == num[p] > 0

(* Helper predicate: process p has the smallest ticket among all *)
Smallest(p) ==
  \A q \in AllProc :
    (num[p] < num[q]) \/ (num[p] = num[q] /\ p <= q)

(* Entry protocol: process p chooses a ticket *)
Enter(p) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = 1 + Max(Seq(num))]

(* Exit protocol: process p releases its ticket *)
Exit(p) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = 0]

(* Step: either a process enters, exits, or stays idle *)
Step ==
  \E p \in AllProc :
    (Choosing(p) /\ Enter(p)) \/ (~Choosing(p) /\ Exit(p))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Step

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Invariant: no two processes are in the critical section simultaneously *)
TypeOK ==
  \A p, q \in AllProc :
    (p /= q /\ HasTicket(p) /\ HasTicket(q)) => p < q

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K,
   size is the number of elements in the queue *)

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)   \* produce a 1
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

Consumer ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)   \* consume the first element
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, NULL
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

States == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

RequestVote(term, candidate) ==
  /\ currentTerm' = term
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![candidate] = candidate]
  /\ UNCHANGED state

ElectionTimeout(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Follower"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED votedFor

Majority(votes) ==
  \E majority \in 1..N : majority > N \div 2 /\ votes = majority

CandidateToLeader(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
  /\ Majority(\E j \in 1..N : votedFor[j] = i)

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ RequestVote(currentTerm, i)
    \/ ElectionTimeout(i)
    \/ CandidateToLeader(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N



VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* State space: readers ∈ 0..N, writer_active ∈ {TRUE, FALSE} *)

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader acquisition: only if no writer active *)
ReaderAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Reader release: decrement count *)
ReaderRelease == 
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer acquisition: only if no readers and no writer *)
WriterAcquire == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer release: set flag to FALSE *)
WriterRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ ReaderAcquire
  \/ ReaderRelease
  \/ WriterAcquire
  \/ WriterRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

(* Invariant: readers never negative and bounded by N *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in 0..N
  /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc
ASSUME N = Cardinality(Proc)

VARIABLES state, channel, recvd

(* state[p] = [local |-> l, snapshot |-> s] where l is local state, s is snapshot flag *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> [local |-> 0, snapshot |-> FALSE]]
        /\ channel = [p \in Proc |-> [q \in Proc |-> <<>>]]
        /\ recvd = [p \in Proc |-> <<>>]

Send(p, q, msg) == 
  channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Append(channel[p][q], msg)]

Recv(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[q][p]) IN
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![q][p] = Tail(channel[q][p])]
  /\ recvd' = [recvd EXCEPT ![p] = Append(recvd[p], msg)]

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = [state[p] EXCEPT !.snapshot = TRUE]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, recvd>>

SendMarker(p, q) == 
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Append(channel[p][q], "marker")]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd>>

Next ==
  \E p, q \in Proc :
    \/ Send(p, q, "msg")
    \/ Recv(p, q)
    \/ RecordState(p)
    \/ SendMarker(p, q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recvd>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES token, sent

(* token: 1..N, the node currently holding the token
   sent: set of nodes that have sent a message in the current round *)

(* Helper to compute the next node in the ring *)
NextNode(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: node 1 holds the token, no messages sent *)
Init == token = 1 /\ sent = {}

(* Action: token passes to the next node *)
Pass == token' = NextNode(token) /\ sent' = sent

(* Action: current token holder sends a message *)
Send == token' = token /\ sent' = sent \cup {token}

(* Next-state relation: either pass the token or send a message *)
Next == Pass \/ Send

(* Fairness: the token circulates infinitely often *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

(* Invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ sent \subseteq 1..N

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE store

(* Helper: check that store is a function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

(* Action: Put(k, v) updates the store *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Action: Get(k) does not change the state *)
Get(k) == k \in Keys

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen

(* ballots: [1..M -> Nat]  -- current ballot number for each proposer
   promises: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest promised ballot and value seen by each acceptor
   accepts: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]   -- highest accepted ballot and value by each acceptor
   chosen: [V -> BOOLEAN]  -- whether a value has been chosen *)

vars == <<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

Init == /\ ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]
        /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
        /\ accepts = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
        /\ chosen = [v \in V |-> FALSE]

Prepare(p) ==
  /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = @ + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<promises, accepts, chosen>>

Promise(a) ==
  LET b == ballots[p] IN
  /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> IF promises[a].ballot > 0 THEN promises[a].value ELSE NULL]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, accepts, chosen>>

Accept(p, v) ==
  LET b == ballots[p] IN
  /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

Chosen(v) ==
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : accepts[a].value = v
  /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, accepts>>

Next ==
  \E p \in 1..M :
    \E v \in V :
      Prepare(p) \/ Accept(p, v) \/ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

(* File is a sequence of chunks, each chunk is a natural number *)
ASSUME
    Len(File) > 0
    \A i \in 1..Len(File): File[i] \in Nat

VARIABLES sent, acked, retrans, lost

(* sent: set of indices of chunks that have been sent
   acked: set of indices of chunks that have been acknowledged
   retrans: mapping from chunk index to number of retransmissions attempted
   lost: set of indices of chunks that have been lost (never delivered) *)

Init ==
    sent = {} /\ acked = {} /\ retrans = [i \in 1..Len(File) |-> 0] /\ lost = {}

Send(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Len(File)
    /\ i \notin sent
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, retrans, lost>>

Ack(i) ==
    /\ i \in sent
    /\ i \notin acked
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retrans, lost>>

Retransmit(i) ==
    /\ i \in sent
    /\ i \notin acked
    /\ retrans[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, lost>>

Lose(i) ==
    /\ i \in sent
    /\ i \notin acked
    /\ lost' = lost \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retrans>>

Next ==
    \E i \in 1..Len(File):
        Send(i) \/ Ack(i) \/ Retransmit(i) \/ Lose(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retrans, lost>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ sent \subseteq 1..Len(File)
    /\ acked \subseteq sent
    /\ IsRecord(retrans)
    /\ \A i \in 1..Len(File): retrans[i] \in Nat
    /\ lost \subseteq 1..Len(File)

====
